seoTitle: Seisia vs Selene — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Seisia and Selene. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Seisia and Selene.
heading: Seisia vs Selene — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Seisia, Queensland and Selene, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Seisia has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Selene (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Seisia or Selene safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Seisia has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Selene scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Seisia scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. Selene scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Seisia or Selene?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Seisia has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
